languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

languages.text: "Естественно, я не явился с пустыми руками — я хотел бы преподнести вам этот аугмент. Теперь, когда машинный дух имплантационного трона бодрствует, я смогу благословить им вас или кого-то из вашей свиты, будь на то воля Вольного Торговца".

"But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."
languages.original_text: "Естественно, я не явился с пустыми руками — я хотел бы преподнести вам этот аугмент. Теперь, когда машинный дух имплантационного трона бодрствует, я смогу благословить им вас или кого-то из вашей свиты, будь на то воля Вольного Торговца".

traits.locale_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation chair is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

"But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation chair is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

"But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

languages.text: "Aber natürlich bin ich nicht mit leeren Händen gekommen. Ich möchte Euch diese Augmentation überreichen. Nun, da der Maschinengeist des Implantationsthrons erwacht ist, kann ich seinen Segen auf Euch selbst oder ein Mitglied Eures Gefolges sprechen, sofern {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} dies wünscht."
languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

traits.locale_text: "Aber natürlich bin ich nicht mit leeren Händen gekommen. Ich möchte Euch diese Augmentation überreichen. Nun, da der Maschinengeist des Implantationsthrons erwacht ist, kann ich seinen Segen auf Euch selbst oder ein Mitglied Eures Gefolges sprechen, sofern {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} dies wünscht."

languages.text: « Mais bien sûr, je ne suis pas arrivé les mains vides. Permettez-vous de vous offrir cette augmentation. Maintenant que l'esprit de la machine du fauteuil d'implantation a été éveillé, je peux conférer cette bénédiction à un membre de votre équipage, s'il vous sied. »
languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

traits.locale_text: « Mais bien sûr, je ne suis pas arrivé les mains vides. Permettez-vous de vous offrir cette augmentation. Maintenant que l'esprit de la machine du fauteuil d'implantation a été éveillé, je peux conférer cette bénédiction à un membre de votre équipage, s'il vous sied. »

languages.text: “当然，我并非空手而来。我愿将这件植入物赠予您。如今移植王座的机魂已然苏醒，只要行商浪人准允，我便可将它的祝福赐予您或您的一位随从。”
languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

traits.locale_text: “当然，我并非空手而来。我愿将这件植入物赠予您。如今移植王座的机魂已然苏醒，只要行商浪人准允，我便可将它的祝福赐予您或您的一位随从。”

languages.text: «Por supuesto, no vengo con las manos vacías. Quiero ofrecerle este aumento. Ahora que el espíritu máquina del trono de implantación ha despertado, puedo otorgarle su bendición a usted o algún miembro de su séquito si así lo desea, Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, no vengo con las manos vacías. Quiero ofrecerle este aumento. Ahora que el espíritu máquina del trono de implantación ha despertado, puedo otorgarle su bendición a usted o algún miembro de su séquito si así lo desea, Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: 「もちろん、手ぶらで来たわけではない。このオーグメントを君に贈りたい。移植の玉座の機械霊が目覚めた今、ローグ・トレーダーが望むなら、君か君の従者の一人にその祝福を授けることができる。」
languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、手ぶらで来たわけではない。このオーグメントを君に贈りたい。移植の玉座の機械霊が目覚めた今、ローグ・トレーダーが望むなら、君か君の従者の一人にその祝福を授けることができる。」

languages.text: "Elbette eli boş gelmedim. Size bu ogmenti sunmak isterim. İmplantasyon tahtının makine ruhu uyandığına göre Hür Tacir dilerse onun lütfunu size veya maiyetinizden birine bahşedebilirim."
languages.original_text: "But of course, I did not come empty-handed. I would like to present you with this augment. Now that the machine spirit of the implantation throne is awake, I can bestow its blessing upon you or one of your retinue, should the Rogue Trader will it."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette eli boş gelmedim. Size bu ogmenti sunmak isterim. İmplantasyon tahtının makine ruhu uyandığına göre Hür Tacir dilerse onun lütfunu size veya maiyetinizden birine bahşedebilirim."
